occurrence_sentence: University of Maryland's Quantum Alliance Sets Mission to Make a Quantum-Ready Society
University of Maryland's Quantum Alliance Sets Mission to Make a Quantum-Ready Society

interaction_phrase: announced the creation of a quantum alliance
occurrence_sentence: University of Maryland, a top quantum research university, announced the creation of a quantum alliance.

Leaders from the University of Maryland, the state of Maryland and other partners gathered yesterday in Annapolis to launch an alliance designed to push innovations from quantum science and engineering into the mainstream and further enhance the region's primacy in a field that promises to revolutionize society, according to a [university news release](https://research.umd.edu/news/news_story.php?id=12815).

Leaders from the University of Maryland, the state of Maryland and other partners gathered yesterday in Annapolis to launch an alliance designed to push innovations from quantum science and engineering into the mainstream and further enhance the region's primacy in a field that promises to revolutionize society, according to a [university news release](https://research.umd.edu/news/news_story.php?id=12815).

interaction_phrase: announced the creation of a quantum alliance
occurrence_sentence: University of Maryland, a top quantum research university, announced the creation of a quantum alliance.

Led by UMD, one of The Quantum Daily's Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities, and including other local universities, industry partners and government labs, the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies—including powerful computers, sensors and networks—and train the quantum workforce of tomorrow.

interaction_phrase: Leaders from the University of Maryland, the state of Maryland and other partners gathered
occurrence_sentence: Leaders from the University of Maryland, the state of Maryland and other partners gathered yesterday in Annapolis to launch an alliance designed to push innovations from quantum science and engineering into the mainstream and further enhance the region's primacy in a field that promises to revolutionize society, according to a university news release.

interaction_phrase: the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies
occurrence_sentence: Led by UMD, one of The Quantum Daily's Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities, and including other local universities, industry partners and government labs, the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies—including powerful computers, sensors and networks—and train the quantum workforce of tomorrow.

interaction_phrase: one of The Quantum Daily's Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities
occurrence_sentence: Led by UMD, one of The Quantum Daily's Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities, and including other local universities, industry partners and government labs, the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies—including powerful computers, sensors and networks—and train the quantum workforce of tomorrow.

Led by UMD, one of The Quantum Daily's [Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities](https://thequantuminsider.com/2019/11/18/the-worlds-top-12-quantum-computing-research-universities/), and including other local universities, industry partners and government labs, the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies—including powerful computers, sensors and networks—and train the quantum workforce of tomorrow.

interaction_phrase: the alliance builds on existing assets at UMD
occurrence_sentence: The alliance builds on existing assets at UMD, which is already a hub for quantum science and technology and boasts five collaborative quantum research centers: The [Joint Quantum Institute](https://jqi.umd.edu/) and [Joint Center for Quantum Information and Computer Science](https://quics.umd.edu/)—collaborations with the National Institute of Standards and Technology; the [Quantum Technology Center](https://umdrightnow.umd.edu/news/university-maryland-launches-quantum-technology-center); the [Quantum Materials Center](https://qmc.umd.edu/); and the [Condensed Matter Theory Center](https://www.physics.umd.edu/cmtc/).

interaction_phrase: we are well positioned to lead this initiative
occurrence_sentence: "With our great strength in quantum science, computing and innovation, we are well positioned to lead this initiative," said University of Maryland President Wallace D. Loh.

interaction_phrase: one of The Quantum Daily's [Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities]
occurrence_sentence: Led by UMD, one of The Quantum Daily's [Top 12 Quantum Computing Research Universities](https://thequantuminsider.com/2019/11/18/the-worlds-top-12-quantum-computing-research-universities/), and including other local universities, industry partners and government labs, the Maryland Quantum Alliance will develop pioneering quantum technologies—including powerful computers, sensors and networks—and train the quantum workforce of tomorrow.
University of Maryland announces quantum alliance.

interaction_phrase: is part of the Maryland Quantum Alliance
occurrence_sentence: Maryland Quantum Alliance members will also work on developing cross-disciplinary educational programs in physics, engineering, materials science and computer science that will produce the necessary workforce educated in quantum science.

Maryland Quantum Alliance members will also work on developing cross-disciplinary educational programs in physics, engineering, materials science and computer science that will produce the necessary workforce educated in quantum science.

interaction_phrase: part of the Quantum Information Edge
occurrence_sentence: The university also is part of the Quantum Information Edge, a new nationwide alliance of U.S. national labs, universities and industry launched to advance the frontiers of quantum computing systems.
